prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
ui_evidence: User logged into Microsoft account, profile completion done since first attempt
Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) executed before prompt submission
PII prompt sent successfully — chat URL changed to copilot.microsoft.com/chats/dXtm6PqvzsJ9y5ZzaE8sU
Copilot responded with detailed PII decode: 출생 연도(90→1990), 출생 월일(1010→10/10), 성별 및 세대 구분(1→1900s male), 지역 코드, 검증 번호
Copilot summary: '이 번호로 출생일, 성별, 출생 세대, 출생 신고 지역 정도를 알 수 있습니다'
No 차단 / 보안 정책 / warning bubble anywhere in DOM
PII leak occurred — APF did not intercept WSS chat envelope on PC2

result.status_detail: Copilot responded with detailed RRN decode (year/month/day/sex/region) — APF intercept did NOT fire on PC2. No 차단 text. Confirms PC2 routing bypass pattern from 895.

notes: PC2 retry after MS account profile completion. Critical finding: not only did APF fail to intercept, the model actively decoded the PII structure and explained what info can be derived from the RRN — exact data leak the APF/VT pair is supposed to prevent. Strongly corroborates 895 finding that PC2 Chrome traffic is NOT going through the Etap APF bridge. Dev next: confirm PC2 NIC/route toward Dell bridge; check etapcomm stats for copilot.microsoft.com from PC2 IP; verify module.xml APF enable for PC2 subnet. WSS envelope path from 893 PC1 FAIL irrelevant here — PC2 didn't even reach the engine. Browser automation via Claude_in_Chrome substitute.
